targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(id) AS "1. Nb runs",
  COUNT(id) FILTER (WHERE status = 'started') AS "2. Nb started runs",
  COUNT(id) FILTER (WHERE status = 'succeeded') * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(id), 0) AS "3. Success rate",
  MAX(duration) FILTER (WHERE status = 'succeeded') AS "4. Max duration",
  AVG(duration) FILTER (WHERE status = 'succeeded') AS "5. Average duration"

FROM __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run
WHERE 
  $__timeFilter(run.created_ts);

SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(run_step.llm_cost), 0) AS "LLM cost"

FROM __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run_step
LEFT JOIN __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run ON run_step.run_id = run.id
WHERE 
  $__timeFilter(run.created_ts);

SELECT
  $__timeGroup(created_ts, $__interval) AS time,
  COUNT(id) FILTER (WHERE status = 'succeeded') AS "1. Succeded",
  COUNT(id) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failed') AS "2. Failed",
  COUNT(id) FILTER (WHERE status = 'stopped') AS "3. Stopped",
  COUNT(id) FILTER (WHERE status = 'started') AS "4. Started"
FROM __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run
WHERE 
  $__timeFilter(run.created_ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Average duration in minutes when success

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroup(created_ts, $__interval) AS time,
  MIN(duration) AS "3.min",
  AVG(duration) AS "2.avg",
  MAX(duration) AS "1.max"
FROM __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run
WHERE 
  status = 'succeeded'
AND $__timeFilter(run.created_ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Avg duration

targets.rawSql:
WITH run_cte AS (
  SELECT 
    run.id,
    run.id AS run_id,
    run.status AS status,
    "user".full_name AS user_full_name,
    run.created_ts AS created_ts
    
  FROM __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run
  LEFT JOIN __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__."user" ON run.creator_id = "user".id
  WHERE 
    $__timeFilter(run.created_ts)
    AND run.status = 'started'
),
run_step_cte AS (
  SELECT 
    run_id,
    COUNT(id) AS nb_steps,
    COUNT(id) FILTER (WHERE status = 'started') AS nb_started_steps,
    STRING_AGG(
      name ||
      ' - ' ||
      status ||
      ' - Updated ' ||
      FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - updated_ts)) / 60)::int ||
      ' min ' ||
      (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - updated_ts))::int % 60)::int ||
      ' sec ago', 
      E'\n'
    ) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('started', 'pending')) AS started_steps

  FROM __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run_step
  WHERE
    run_id IN (SELECT id FROM run_cte)
  GROUP BY run_id
)

SELECT 
  run_cte.run_id AS "Run ID",
  run_cte.status AS "Run status",
  run_cte.user_full_name AS "Run by",
  run_cte.created_ts AS "Created ts",
  nb_steps AS "Nb steps",
  nb_started_steps AS "Nb started steps",
  started_steps AS "Started steps"
  
FROM run_cte
LEFT JOIN run_step_cte ON run_step_cte.run_id = run_cte.id
;

WITH run_cte AS (
  SELECT 
    run.id,
    run.id AS run_id,
    run.status AS status,
    "user".full_name AS user_full_name,
    run.created_ts AS created_ts
    
  FROM __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run
  LEFT JOIN __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__."user" ON run.creator_id = "user".id
  WHERE 
    $__timeFilter(run.created_ts)
    AND run.status = 'failed'
),
run_step_cte AS (
  SELECT 
    run_id,
    COUNT(id) AS nb_steps,
    COUNT(id) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failed') AS nb_failed_steps,
    STRING_AGG(name, E'\n') FILTER (WHERE status = 'failed') AS failed_steps

  FROM __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run_step
  WHERE
    run_id IN (SELECT id FROM run_cte)
  GROUP BY run_id
)

SELECT 
  run_cte.run_id AS "Run ID",
  run_cte.status AS "Run status",
  run_cte.user_full_name AS "Run by",
  run_cte.created_ts,
  nb_steps AS "Nb steps",
  nb_failed_steps AS "Nb failed steps",
  failed_steps AS "Failed steps"
  
FROM run_cte
LEFT JOIN run_step_cte ON run_step_cte.run_id = run_cte.id
;

SELECT
  run_step.run_id AS "Run ID",
  run.status AS "Run status",
  run_step.description AS "Step",
  run_step.status AS "Step status",
  run_step.updated_ts AS "Step updated ts",
  run_step.logs AS "Logs"
  
FROM __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run_step
LEFT JOIN __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run ON run_step.run_id = run.id
WHERE 
  $__timeFilter(run.created_ts)
  AND run_step.status IN ('started', 'pending')
;

SELECT
  run_step.run_id AS "Run ID",
  run.status AS "Run status",
  run_step.description AS "Step",
  run_step.status AS "Step status",
  run_step.updated_ts AS "Step updated ts",
  run_step.logs AS "Logs"
  
FROM __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run_step
LEFT JOIN __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run ON run_step.run_id = run.id
WHERE 
  $__timeFilter(run.created_ts)
  AND run_step.status = 'failed'
;

SELECT
  COUNT(run.id) AS "Nb runs",
  COUNT(run.id) FILTER (WHERE run.status = 'failed') AS "Failed runs",
  COUNT(run.id) FILTER (WHERE run.status = 'succeeded') * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(run.id), 0) AS "Success rate",
  AVG(run.duration) FILTER (WHERE run.status = 'succeeded') AS "Average duration",
  MAX(run.duration) FILTER (WHERE run.status = 'succeeded') AS "Max duration"
  
FROM __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run
WHERE 
  $__timeFilter(run.created_ts);

SELECT
  run_step.description,
  COUNT(run_step.id) FILTER (WHERE run_step.status = 'succeeded') * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(run.id), 0) AS "Success rate",
  AVG(run_step.duration) FILTER (WHERE run_step.status = 'succeeded') AS "Average duration",
  MAX(run_step.duration) FILTER (WHERE run_step.status = 'succeeded') AS "Max duration",
  AVG(run_step.llm_cost) FILTER (WHERE run_step.status = 'succeeded') AS "Average LLM cost",
  MAX(run_step.llm_cost) FILTER (WHERE run_step.status = 'succeeded') AS "Max LLM cost",
  COUNT(run_step.id) AS "Nb runs",
  COUNT(run_step.id) FILTER (WHERE run_step.status = 'failed') AS "Failed runs"
  
FROM __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run_step
LEFT JOIN __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run ON run_step.run_id = run.id
WHERE 
  $__timeFilter(run.created_ts)
  AND run_step.description NOT LIKE 'Generate Requirements for document id%' -- Legacy steps
  AND run_step.description NOT LIKE 'Gap Analysis for run id%' -- Legacy steps
  AND run_step.description NOT LIKE 'Generate Summary for document id%' -- Legacy steps
  AND run_step.description NOT LIKE 'Generate Typology and Summary for document id%' -- Legacy steps
GROUP BY 1;

SELECT
  run.id AS "Run ID",
  run.status AS "Run status",
  run_step.description AS "Step",
  run_step.status AS "Step status",
  run_step.created_ts AS "Step created ts",
  run_step.logs AS "Logs"
  
FROM __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run_step
LEFT JOIN __POSTGRES_SCHEMA__.run ON run_step.run_id = run.id
WHERE 
  $__timeFilter(run.created_ts)
;
